title: elaeocarpus urophyllus
intro: Elaeocarpus urophyllus, also known as the blue duke or blue bean tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Elaeocarpaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus urophyllus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant and immunomodulatory activities. Elaeocarpus urophyllus is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and capsules, although more research is needed to fully understand its therapeutic potential.
